text.title: Accessibility Evaluation Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying Accessibility Evaluation to a concrete case.

section.title: Triage of 3 axe findings

example.code:
## P (Perceivable) - F-001 SC 1.3.1 [critical] form#contact email input has no label. W3C H44. - F-002 SC 1.4.3 [high] body text on #hero fails 4.5:1 (3.8:1 measured). W3C G18.
## O (Operable) - F-003 SC 2.4.7 [medium] focus indicator on .card-link removed by global outline:none. W3C G149.

section.note: Each finding cites the W3C technique number; priorities differentiate sprint allocation.
